_meta.algorithm: SHA-256 of raw content + SHA-256 of normalised content
_meta.normalisation: Strip comments and whitespace; redact token/endpoint variable values
_meta.purpose: Known-good CSS/JS hashes from legitimate brand login pages. Any phishkit resource rule that matches one of these hashes is capturing a brand-cloned file — it will false-positive on the real brand's login page. Used by harvest-resource-hashes.js (warn at creation), resource-hash-detector.js (suppress at runtime), and agent-rule-quality-gate.js (block at promotion).
_meta.note: EMPTY PLACEHOLDER. Run tools/generate-resource-hashes.js to populate from live brand login pages.
